anchor: Which database stores local metadata for Project Phoenix?
positive: Project Phoenix uses SQLite for local metadata and Qdrant for vector search.
negatives: Project Phoenix uses Qdrant for vector search over embedded memories.
Project Phoenix uses llama.cpp for endpoint smoke checks.

anchor: What is the current preferred local embedding model?
positive: The current preferred local embedding model is nomic-embed-text because it is the working baseline.
negatives: The preferred local embedding model was old-embed-1024.
The preferred local runtime for daily chat is Ollama.

anchor: Which benchmark uses distractor resistance cases?
positive: The mem0 memory benchmark uses direct recall, recency conflict, and distractor resistance cases.
negatives: The Hermes tool-call benchmark uses strict held-out function-call cases.
The runtime endpoint benchmark checks OpenAI-compatible model and chat endpoints.
